---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an enhancement or new feature for BrokenOps
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Feature Description
A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like to see implemented.

## Problem Statement
Describe the problem or limitation this feature would solve. What currently doesn't work as expected or could be improved?

## Proposed Solution
Describe how you envision this feature working. Include:
- How users would interact with it
- What the expected behavior would be
- Any configuration or setup required

## Use Case
Explain when and why someone would use this feature. Provide real-world scenarios where this would be beneficial.

## Alternatives Considered
Have you considered any alternative solutions or workarounds? If so, describe them and why they're not ideal.

## Additional Context
Add any other context, screenshots, diagrams, or examples that would help explain the feature request.

## Impact
- [ ] Affects frontend only
- [ ] Affects backend only
- [ ] Affects both frontend and backend
- [ ] Affects lab infrastructure
- [ ] Affects deployment/configuration
